title: Installer port preflight UX
acceptanceCriteria: Installer preflights all planned HappyTG ports before service start and distinguishes supported reuse from real conflicts.
Interactive install offers three nearby free ports, manual entry, and abort, then saves the explicit override into .env without silent rebinds.
Bootstrap/setup diagnostics preserve env override precedence, expose listener attribution, and stay covered by deterministic regression tests and proof artifacts.
